nodes.title: Lit Instruct/Interv Practicum
nodes.description: Approaches for instruction, prevention, intervention of reading and written language skills.  Supervised teaching of individuals and/or small groups experiencing reading and language problems.  Apprenticeships in reading instructional program. Pre/co-requisite: Three graduate credits in Reading/Language Arts or Instructor permission.

nodes.title: Cltvate Chil Lit in El/Mid Sch
nodes.description: Contemporary research and practice related to the development of strategic, motivated, and independent readers and writers. Emphasis on integrating reading and writing within collaborative environments. Prerequisite: Twelve hours in education and/or related areas including an introductory course in reading; or Instructor permission.
nodes.prereq_expression: {"type": "OR", "operands": [{"type": "other", "text": "Twelve hours in education and/or related areas including an introductory course in reading"}, {"type": "other", "text": "Instructor permission"}]}
